allow: Bash(python manage.py shell -c "from apps.students.models import Student; print\(f'Students: {Student.objects.count\(\)}'\); print\([s.name for s in Student.objects.all\(\)[:3]]\)")

Bash(python manage.py shell -c "from apps.lessons.models import Lesson; from datetime import date; print\(f'Total Lessons: {Lesson.objects.count\(\)}'\); today_lessons = Lesson.objects.filter\(class_date=date.today\(\)\); print\(f'Today lessons: {today_lessons.count\(\)}'\); print\([f'{l.student.name} {l.class_date}' for l in Lesson.objects.all\(\)[:3]]\)")
